name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W213/S213, C238 (4.0L V8 twin-turbo petrol, AMG)

serviceNotes.engine oil: AMG M177 V8: shorter oil intervals than non-AMG E-Class (commonly 10,000 km / 12 months EU AMG maintenance; track use ~8,000 km).
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per AMG maintenance schedule.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: High-flow path; follow ASSYST / inspection (~60,000 km planning).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; track days warrant more frequent checks.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Inspect at least every 20,000 km or before track use.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: AMG twin-turbo V8: plugs typically earlier than non-AMG (40,000 km / 36 months orientation—verify ASSYST).
serviceNotes.coolant: High thermal load; follow Mercedes high-mileage coolant renewal.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: AMG SPEEDSHIFT MCT / 9G variant: preventive fluid ~60,000 km per specialist practice.
serviceNotes.rear axle differential oil: Rear axle / LSD fluid ~60,000 km preventive.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Supplementary exchange ~100,000 km under hard use.
serviceNotes.poly-V belt: Accessory belt ~80,000 km under high load.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: DI biturbo V8: inspect from ~80,000 km if idle or boost issues.
